title: Burning Iron Skies Project
description: Fantacy-focused industrial survival with factories, trains.
body:
# A heavy-duty Forge 1.20.1 modpack built for players who want Minecraft to feel bigger, harsher, and more alive. This pack blends industrial tech, deep exploration, improved combat, atmospheric audio, and massive worldgen into one brutal sandbox.

Explore worlds reshaped by Terralith, Tectonic, and YUNG’s structure mods, then automate, build, and conquer using Create and its expansions. The environment is immersive and unforgiving, backed by Sound Physics Remastered, ambient audio, and optional shader support via Oculus + Embeddium.

Combat is expanded and more tactical with mods like Spartan Weaponry, Weapon Master, shields, firearms, and hostile mobs that actually feel dangerous. Villages are smarter and more alive, storage is streamlined, and quality-of-life improvements keep the grind fun instead of painful.

Whether you’re building industrial monstrosities, surviving a hostile world, or exploring massive structures and ruins, this modpack is designed to feel cohesive, intense, and modern.

Key Features:

Forge 1.20.1

Massive world generation overhaul

Create-based engineering and automation

Expanded weapons, shields, and combat systems

Fallout-inspired content and industrial blocks

Immersive sound, performance optimizations, and shader support

Exploration-focused progression with survival challenge

Recommended for mid–high-end PCs. Not recommended for people who like vanilla staying vanilla.
